title: Weak-Side CB Balancing Shape
description: You are the weak-side centre-back while the ball is trapped on the opposite flank. Hold balance to protect switch and central depth.
teaching_point: Stay connected to the center while keeping enough depth to deal with the weak-side switch.

feedback_hints.success: You balanced the line and protected both the central lane and weak-side switch.
feedback_hints.common_error: You over-shifted toward the ball side and left weak-side depth uncovered.
feedback_hints.teaching_emphasis: Weak-side center-back must protect what the ball side cannot see.
success_points: You held an inside shoulder position to defend the switch lane.
Your depth protected the space behind the midfield line.
error_points: Over-shifting made the far-side switch too easy.
You were too high to protect depth if the trap was broken.
alternate_points: A slightly narrower position can still be valid if the weak-side fullback drops.
